tasks.description: Improve log output clarity in core scripts and refine error handling messages for better troubleshooting UX.
Ensure journal logs are clear for the restricted services (neos-autoupdate.service, neos-liveuser-setup.service) to prevent debugging UX issues due to missing permissions.
Validate UX consistency and accessibility of Phase 6. Validate the implementation of Windows-familiar shortcuts (Meta+E, Meta+D) and default themes. Ensure contrast is adequate.
